public.hero_title: Get a ride anywhere in Mauritius
public.hero_sub: Book a trusted taxi anywhere on the island — from SSR Airport to Grand Baie, Flic en Flac to Le Morne. No account, no upfront payment. Just the ride.
public.partners_label: Trusted by partners in tourism & hospitality
public.how_sub: No sign-up, no card details, no hassle. Enter where you are, where you're going, and we'll match you with a trusted driver nearby.
public.step1_body: Tell us where to grab you and where you're headed. Airport, hotel, beach, village — we cover every corner of the island.
public.step2_body: Distance, duration, and an honest estimated cost before you book. No surge. No surprises. You pay the driver directly, in cash or by card.
public.step3_body: Post your booking and verified drivers nearby accept in seconds. We send you name, photo, car and plate, so you know exactly who's coming.
public.calc_heading: Know the price, before you ride.
public.calc_sub: Every route is priced from real-world distance and road conditions — airport runs, coastal drives, cross-island transfers. What you see is what you'll be asked to pay.
public.calc_bullet1: Base fare + per-km rate, configurable at the operator level
public.calc_bullet2: Airport pickup surcharge baked in where applicable
public.calc_bullet3: Night tariff (22:00 – 05:00) clearly flagged before booking
public.calc_bullet4: Pay the driver directly — cash, card, or local mobile money
public.widget_note: * Estimate only. Final fare is set by the driver and shown before confirmation.
public.driver_sub: Already running a taxi in Mauritius? Join the platform, complete verification, and start receiving bookings the same week. You keep every rupee you're paid — we just connect the ride.
public.perk1_desc: Upload your National ID, driving licence, and PSV licence. We review in 48 hours.
public.perk2_desc: Riders pay you directly. We never touch your income — we charge drivers a flat monthly package, not a commission.
public.perk3_desc: Accept up to 5 bookings a month on the free tier. Upgrade any time to unlock more.
public.cta_sub: Whether it's a 2 a.m. airport run or a Sunday trip to Le Morne — Mauritian Rides connects you to a verified driver in under a minute.

consent.title: Help us improve Mauritian Rides
consent.body: We use anonymous analytics to understand how the app is used and fix issues faster. No personal data is sold. You can change this at any time in your account settings.
